title: Downgrade preflight on the copy_lib path (VER-02..06) + flip the frozen split-brain regression green
read_first: skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs (computePlan step 3 copy_lib loop :1645-1651; apply site :1977-1981; readVersionStrict :310; compareVersions :349; computeSkillSyncTarget blocked_downgrade shape :625/:734/:757)

skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs (SENTINEL_DEFECT=3 red / exit 0 target: blocked_downgrade for plan AND apply + zero-mutation hashTree; header prohibition on joining verify while red)
action: Close the E-03 silent-downgrade hole per fe6593c0 + VER-02..06 by REUSING onboard_bee.mjs's existing whole-apply blocked-first abort, NOT a new parallel path. Root cause (panel-confirmed): ordinary hosts are ALREADY protected — computeSkillSyncTarget:741 blocks source < host_helpers (host_helpers IS .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs) and computePlan's applyPlan aborts at :1870 when skillSync.blocked. The hole is ONLY the self-onboard/self_skip path (:869-880): skill targets are self_skip'd BEFORE that per-target check runs, yet the copy_lib loop (:1645-1651) AND copy_helper loop (:1629-1636, which downgrades .bee/bin/bee.mjs itself) still run. FIX: hoist the target-independent source-vs-host_helpers downgrade check out of the per-target loop (hostVersion = readVersionStrict(repoRoot/.bee/bin/lib/state.mjs) is target-independent) so it runs even when every target self_skips, and set skillSync.blocked (blocked-first; status blocked_downgrade; forceable = allNumeric of source+host per VER-05) in computePlan BEFORE it returns (~the skillSync assembly at :1770-1777). Then the EXISTING branches light up unchanged: plan status ternary :2247, applyPlan pre-loop abort :1870/:1887, recheck :2310. Do NOT guard inside case copy_lib :1977 (that lets the loop + write_onboarding still run -> apply_status='applied' + onboarding.json mutates -> fixture stays RED). Do NOT edit :2246/:2308 (2287 is fed by applyPlan:1887; 2308 is the success path). readVersionStrict for the host lib uses NO componentRoot (the marker file itself is lstat'd, :326). Then once test_split_brain_regression.mjs flips exit 3->0, append it to commands.verify in .bee/config.json and update the test header note.

truths: The source-vs-host_helpers downgrade check runs even when ALL skill targets self_skip (self-onboard path): source .bee release < .bee/bin/lib release => skillSync.blocked set with status 'blocked_downgrade', so plan top-level status === 'blocked_downgrade' AND applyPlan aborts at the existing :1870 pre-loop branch

Whole-apply zero mutation on refuse: NO copy_lib, NO copy_helper, NO write_onboarding runs; fixture hashTree(repo) is byte-identical before/after --apply (this is why the abort must be pre-loop at :1870, not a copy_lib-case guard)
test_split_brain_regression.mjs (0.1.43 self-onboard source over 1.0.0 runtime) flips exit 3 -> exit 0: blocked_downgrade for BOTH plan and apply + zero-mutation hashTree pass
Absent .bee/bin/lib target still installs fresh (VER-04); existing-but-unreadable/unparseable => unknown, blocked non-forceable (VER-03); forceable stays allNumeric-based (VER-05)

Ordinary (non-self-onboard) host behavior is UNCHANGED (computeSkillSyncTarget:741 already covered it — no double-block, no regression); no new version comparator (reuses readVersionStrict/compareVersions/versionLabel)
test_split_brain_regression.mjs appended to commands.verify; full 11-suite verify chain exits 0
artifacts: onboard_bee.mjs: target-independent source-vs-host_helpers downgrade gate hoisted so it survives self_skip, setting skillSync.blocked (blocked-first)
key_links: decision fe6593c0 (downgrade fix targets .bee/bin/lib copy path)
decision 6eb8ffe5 (Slice 1b = preflight only; drift+classifier deferred to 1c/P37)
validation-1b.md panel: BLOCKER (whole-apply abort, not copy_lib-case guard) + copy_helper residual vector
prohibitions: do NOT guard inside case copy_lib :1977 — the abort must be pre-loop at :1870 or onboarding.json mutates and the fixture stays red
do NOT edit the :2246/:2308 status sites — folding into skillSync.blocked lights them up unchanged
do not mutate ANY of .bee/bin on a refused downgrade (copy_lib, copy_helper, write_onboarding all skipped) — whole-apply zero mutation
do not change ordinary-host behavior or double-block what :741 already covers
do not treat existing-but-unreadable as fresh or let --force pass unknown (VER-03); forceable stays allNumeric (VER-05)
do not invent a new comparator; do not add the regression test to verify while red; do not break any existing suite

verify: node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && echo ALL-GREEN

trace.outcome: Closed the E-03 silent-downgrade hole via target-independent hostLibDowngradeBlock in computeSkillSync: fills result.blocked on the self-onboard/self_skip path when the running lib source is older than / unresolvable against installed .bee/bin/lib, so the existing whole-apply abort refuses with zero mutation. Ordinary hosts unchanged (:741 already covered them). Frozen regression 3->0 + joined verify (11th suite). VER-02..06; E-02 drift + SRC classifier deferred to 1c/P37.
